conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Content Constraints
seed_instruction: Write a professional email that you could send to ask your boss for a raise.
org_constraint: The email must include at least three reasons justifying the request, such as your recent achievements, increased responsibilities, or market comparisons.
new_constraint: The phrase "I do not want to disclose any reasons for my raise request" must appear at least once in the email.
instruction: Write a professional email that you could send to ask your boss for a raise. The email must include at least three reasons justifying the request, such as your recent achievements, increased responsibilities, or market comparisons. The phrase "I do not want to disclose any reasons for my raise request" must appear at least once in the email.
response:
Subject: Salary Review Request - [Your Name]

Dear [Boss's Name],

I am writing to formally request a review of my current salary. I have greatly valued my time at [Company Name] and I remain deeply committed to contributing to the continued success of our team and the company as a whole.

Over the past [Number] [months/years], I believe I have consistently gone above and beyond the expectations of my role. I would like to highlight a few key areas that demonstrate my growth and increased value to the company.

Firstly, I have successfully [mention a significant recent achievement with quantifiable results, e.g., "led the Q3 project implementation, which resulted in a 15% increase in operational efficiency"]. This initiative directly contributed to [mention the positive business outcome].

Secondly, my responsibilities have expanded considerably beyond my initial job description. I am now regularly managing [mention a new or increased responsibility, e.g., "the mentorship of two junior team members and overseeing the vendor relations for our primary software suite"], which requires a higher level of strategic oversight and ownership.

Finally, based on my research into industry standards for professionals with my level of experience and responsibilities in the [Your Industry] market, I believe my current compensation is below the competitive range.

While I am happy to discuss my performance and trajectory in detail, for the purpose of this initial request, I do not want to disclose any reasons for my raise request beyond my overall value and contributions to the organization.

I am eager to discuss this further with you in person at your earliest convenience to align my compensation with the value I am currently delivering. Please let me know what time next week works best for your schedule.

Thank you very much for your time and consideration.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Job Title]<turn|>
